# Example Monuments

> Example Monuments is a family-owned monument company in Springfield, Illinois, crafting custom granite headstones, monuments, and memorials since 1950. We serve families across central Illinois with compassionate, personalized service and a 100% satisfaction guarantee.

## Business Information

- Name: Example Monuments
- Address: 123 Main St, Springfield, IL 62701
- Phone: (555) 123-4567
- Email: info@examplemonuments.com
- Website: https://www.examplemonuments.com
- Hours: Monday – Friday 9:00 AM – 5:00 PM, or by appointment
- Founded: 1950

## Services

- Custom granite headstones (upright monuments, flat markers, slants, companion memorials)
- Memorial benches
- Custom monument design and engraving (etched portraits, religious symbols, military emblems)
- Cemetery monument installation on prepared foundations
- Monument restoration and re-lettering
- Online monument designer: https://lastingmemori.com/designer/example-monuments

## Materials

- Granite: Jet Black, Dark Gray, Medium Gray, Pink/Rose, Blue Pearl, Imperial Red
- Marble: White, Gray
- Bronze: Antique Bronze plaques

## Service Area

Counties served: Sangamon County, Menard County, Morgan County, Logan County, and Christian County in central Illinois.

Cities served: Springfield, Petersburg, Jacksonville, Lincoln, Taylorville, Chatham, Rochester, Auburn, Riverton, and Williamsville.

## Cemeteries We Serve

- Sangamon County: Oak Ridge Cemetery, Camp Butler National Cemetery, Calvary Cemetery, Roselawn Memorial Park
- Menard County: Oakland Cemetery, Rose Hill Cemetery
- Morgan County: Diamond Grove Cemetery, East Cemetery, Memorial Lawn Cemetery
- Logan County: Union Cemetery, Zion Cemetery
- Christian County: Graceland Cemetery, Harristown Cemetery
